title: Standard Chartered-backed Libeara raises $14m from GSR, Kyobo Life, others for tokenization
message_html: Standard Chartered-backed Libeara raises $14m from GSR, Kyobo Life, others for tokenization ...
snippet: Libeara, the tokenization platform incubated by Standard Chartered’s SC Ventures, has closed a $14 million strategic funding round led by global market maker GSR. The round also includes Openspace Capital, Kyobo Life Insurance Group, AlloyX, Kaia Investment Partners, Simsan Ventures and Monk’s Hill

title: Blockchain platform Allium raises $40 million Series B
message_html: Blockchain platform Allium raises $40 million Series B ...
snippet: Allium, the leading blockchain data platform for enterprises, today announced it has raised $40 million in Series B funding led by Amplify Partners, with participation from existing investors Kleiner Perkins and Theory Ventures. Amplify’s David Beyer will join the Board as part of the investment.
